classes.name: DriftClient
classes.docstring:
This class is the main way to interact with Drift Protocol including
depositing, opening new positions, closing positions, placing orders, etc.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initializes the drift client object

Args:
    connection (AsyncClient): Solana RPC connection
    wallet (Keypair | Wallet): Wallet for transaction signing
    env (DriftEnv | None, optional): Drift environment. Defaults to "mainnet".
    opts (TxOpts, optional): Transaction options. Defaults to DEFAULT_TX_OPTIONS.
    authority (Pubkey | None, optional): Authority for transactions. If None, defaults to wallet's public key.
    account_subscription (AccountSubscriptionConfig, optional): Config for account subscriptions. Defaults to AccountSubscriptionConfig.default().
    perp_market_indexes (list[int] | None, optional): List of perp market indexes to subscribe to. Defaults to None.
    spot_market_indexes (list[int] | None, optional): List of spot market indexes to subscribe to. Defaults to None.
    oracle_infos (list[OracleInfo] | None, optional): List of oracle infos to subscribe to. Defaults to None.
    tx_params (Optional[TxParams], optional): Transaction parameters. Defaults to None.
    tx_version (Optional[TransactionVersion], optional): Transaction version. Defaults to None.
    tx_sender (TxSender | None, optional): Custom transaction sender. Defaults to None.
    active_sub_account_id (Optional[int], optional): Active sub-account ID. Defaults to None.
    sub_account_ids (Optional[list[int]], optional): List of sub-account IDs. Defaults to None.
    market_lookup_table (Optional[Pubkey], optional): Market lookup table pubkey (deprecated). Defaults to None.
    market_lookup_tables (Optional[list[Pubkey]], optional): List of market lookup table pubkeys. Defaults to None.
    jito_params (Optional[JitoParams], optional): Parameters for Jito MEV integration. Defaults to None.
    tx_sender_blockhash_commitment (Commitment | None, optional): Blockhash commitment for tx sender. Defaults to None.
    enforce_tx_sequencing (bool, optional): Whether to enforce transaction sequencing. Defaults to False.
methods.signature: (self, connection: AsyncClient, wallet: Keypair | Wallet, env: DriftEnv | None = 'mainnet', opts: TxOpts = DEFAULT_TX_OPTIONS, authority: Pubkey | None = None, account_subscription: AccountSubscriptionConfig = AccountSubscriptionConfig.default(), perp_market_indexes: list[int] | None = None, spot_market_indexes: list[int] | None = None, oracle_infos: list[OracleInfo] | None = None, tx_params: Optional[TxParams] = None, tx_version: Optional[TransactionVersion] = None, tx_sender: TxSender | None = None, active_sub_account_id: Optional[int] = None, sub_account_ids: Optional[list[int]] = None, market_lookup_table: Optional[Pubkey] = None, market_lookup_tables: Optional[list[Pubkey]] = None, jito_params: Optional[JitoParams] = None, tx_sender_blockhash_commitment: Commitment | None = None, enforce_tx_sequencing: bool = False)

methods.name: add_insurance_fund_stake
methods.signature: (self, spot_market_index: int, amount: int, user_token_account: Pubkey = None)

cancel specific order (if order_id=None will be most recent order)

    sub_account_id (int, optional): subaccount id which contains order. Defaults to 0.

Returns:

methods.signature: (self, order_id: Optional[int] = None, sub_account_id: int = None) -> Signature

methods.name: cancel_orders
methods.docstring:
cancel all existing orders on the book

Args:
    market_type (MarketType, optional): only cancel orders for single market, used with market_index
    market_index (int, optional): only cancel orders for single market, used with market_type
    direction: (PositionDirection, optional): only cancel bids or asks
    sub_account_id (int, optional): subaccount id. Defaults to 0.

Returns:
    Signature: tx sig
methods.signature: (self, market_type: MarketType = None, market_index: int = None, direction: PositionDirection = None, sub_account_id: int = None) -> Signature

methods.name: deposit
methods.docstring:
deposits collateral into protocol

Args:
    amount (int): amount to deposit
    spot_market_index (int):
    user_token_account (Pubkey):
    sub_account_id (int, optional): subaccount to deposit into. Defaults to 0.
    reduce_only (bool, optional): paying back borrow vs depositing new assets. Defaults to False.
    user_initialized (bool, optional): if need to initialize user account too set this to False. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    TxSigAndSlot: tx sig and slot
methods.signature: (self, amount: int, spot_market_index: int, user_token_account: Pubkey, sub_account_id: Optional[int] = None, reduce_only = False, user_initialized = True) -> TxSigAndSlot

methods.name: withdraw
methods.docstring:
withdraws from drift protocol (can also allow borrowing)

Args:
    amount (int): amount to withdraw
    market_index (int):
    user_token_account (Pubkey): ata of the account to withdraw to
    reduce_only (bool, optional): if True will only withdraw existing funds else if False will allow taking out borrows. Defaults to False.
    sub_account_id (int, optional): subaccount. Defaults to 0.

Returns:
    str: tx sig

docstring:
Helper functions for interacting with the Drift Vaults program.

This module provides utilities for querying vault information, depositors,
and other vault-related data.

Python functions provided here are for basic usage.
For a complete vaults SDK, please see https://github.com/velocity-exchange/drift-vaults

functions.name: fetch_all_vault_depositors
functions.docstring:
Fetch all vault depositors from the program

Args:
    program: The vaults program

Returns:
    Dictionary with 'regular' and 'tokenized' depositor lists

functions.name: filter_vault_depositors
functions.docstring:
Filter depositors for a specific vault from pre-fetched depositor data

Args:
    depositors_data: Dictionary with 'regular' and 'tokenized' depositor lists
    vault_pubkey: The public key of the vault (can be string or Pubkey)

Returns:
    List of vault depositor accounts for the specified vault

functions.name: get_all_vaults
functions.docstring:
Get all vaults from the program

Args:
    program: The vaults program

Returns:
    List of vault accounts with their data

functions.name: get_depositor_info
functions.docstring:
Get detailed information about a specific depositor in a vault

Args:
    program: The vaults program
    vault_pubkey: The public key of the vault
    depositor_pubkey: The public key of the depositor

Returns:
    Dictionary with depositor information if found, None otherwise
functions.signature: (program: Program, vault_pubkey: Pubkey, depositor_pubkey: Pubkey) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]

functions.name: get_vault_by_name
functions.docstring:
Get a vault by its name

Args:
    program: The vaults program
    name: The name of the vault
    case_sensitive: Whether to match the vault name case-sensitively

Returns:
    The vault account with its data if found, None otherwise
functions.signature: (program: Program, name: str, case_sensitive: bool = False) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]

functions.name: get_vault_depositors
functions.docstring:
Get all depositors for a specific vault

Args:
    program: The vaults program
    vault_pubkey: The public key of the vault (can be string or Pubkey)

Returns:
    List of vault depositor accounts with their data

functions.name: get_vault_stats
functions.docstring:
Get detailed statistics for a vault including total deposits, shares, etc.

Args:
    program: The vaults program
    vault_pubkeys: The public keys of the vaults
    include_depositors: Whether to include depositors in the stats

Returns:
    Dictionary with vault statistics
functions.signature: (program: Program, vault_pubkeys: List[Pubkey], include_depositors: bool = False) -> Dict[str, Any]

functions.name: get_vaults_program
functions.docstring: Get the vaults program as an anchorpy Program object
